summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Potentially mergeable contributor PR after maintainer-side finalization, but plan mode lacks required merge preflight. Repair should target contributor branch finalization rather than replacement first because maintainer_can_modify=true.
Small contributor fix with useful tests, but merge recommendation is blocked until final branch/current-main preflight and Codex review are completed.
Broad feature/config/schema delta with failing checks and unresolved bot-review proof. This is outside a safe automated repair plan for this shard.
The core fix appears plausible and validated, but the large fixture snapshot churn requires maintainer judgment or a narrower follow-up job before merge/fix automation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalization plan for the small non-security PRs that are useful but missing required merge preflight. Do not attempt #78452 or #89745 in this fix artifact because they require maintainer judgment for broad code delta.
repair_candidate.pr_title: chore: finalize ready small PR remediation shard 102
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Finalize the small ready PRs from Clownfish inventory shard live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-102 when direct merge preflight cannot be completed.
- Preserve contributor/source credit for #76744, #76920, and #77339.
- Leave #78452 and #89745 for maintainer judgment because their hydrated artifacts show broad code deltas, and #78452 also has failing checks plus unresolved bot-review proof.

## Source PRs and Credit
- #76744 docs: standardize ACP behavior spelling; credit source issue #76734 by @steipete and the ClawSweeper replacement PR body.
- #76920 fix(telegram): preserve forum topic routing; source PR by @kesslerio.
- #77339 fix(auto-reply): clear runtime model cache on reset; source PR by @mjamiv / commit author hewekdyou.

## Validation
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `pnpm -s vitest run extensions/telegram/src/draft-stream.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent.direct-delivery-core-channels.test.ts src/infra/outbound/targets.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts`
- Codex `/review` must pass cleanly before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve #76744 credit to source issue #76734 by @steipete and the ClawSweeper replacement PR body credit note.
Preserve #76920 source PR credit to @kesslerio for Telegram topic routing work.
Preserve #77339 source PR credit to @mjamiv / commit author hewekdyou for the auto-reply reset cache fix.
needs_human: #78452: broad WhatsApp feature PR has failing checks plus unresolved bot-review/preflight proof.
#89745: usage fix has passing checks but broad snapshot churn that requires maintainer judgment or a narrower split.
